entities.description: A cereal crop evaluated for grain zinc content across different genotypes.

entities.description: The concentration of zinc in the grains, used as a marker for nutritional quality.

entities.description: A rapid screening method used to evaluate zinc content in grain samples.

entities.name: AAS METHOD
entities.description: Atomic Absorption Spectroscopy used for the precise estimation of grain zinc content.

entities.name: DTZ STAINING
entities.description: A staining procedure using dithizone that produces red colour intensity proportional to zinc concentration.

entities.name: GENOTYPE X ENVIRONMENT INTERACTION
entities.description: The combined effect of genetic variation and environmental conditions on the trait across different seasons.
